_meta.purpose: Authoritative buff/debuff/effect KEYWORD glossary — the semantic layer the model was missing. Champion skills are written in [keyword] brackets; this is the dictionary of what each keyword DOES. Distinct from champion_skills.skill_summary (per-champion writeups) and from champion_tags (lossy labels).
_meta.source: In-game encyclopedia / stat-site compilation of Plarium mechanic definitions (Tier-1 factual game data). Provided by Mike 2026-07-16.
_meta.note: Verbatim/near-verbatim definitions. `aliases` bridge skill-text spellings (Decrease DEF, C. RATE, Cyrillic homoglyphs, British 'Defence'). Boss-specific keywords tagged with `scope`.
_meta.entry_template: Simple keyword = {name, aliases, def}. A DEEP-mechanic keyword adds: `mechanics` (the full ruleset, verbatim), `modelFlags` (machine-readable facts the engine reads — e.g. damageType/stacks), and `variants` (value + targeting dims the tags should carry). Ally Protection is the worked example. Deep gameplay pages get FANNED OUT: the mechanic rules → here; interaction/stacking rules → lib/damage-mechanics.js; value+target → richer champion_tags; the champ list → verifies champion_tags rows; build advice → derived (not copied) into the explanation layer.

buffs.name: Ally Protection
buffs.def: The Caster takes 25/50% of DIRECT damage inflicted upon a protected ally. Self-inflicted damage, Poison, and HP Burn do NOT trigger it.
mechanics: Only DIRECT damage transfers (instant A1/A2/A3 hits that show a damage number). DoT (Poison/HP Burn) and self-inflicted damage do NOT transfer.

The transferred amount is RAW: not reduced by the protected ally's DEF, damage-reduction passives, buffs (Strengthen/Increase DEF/Shield), or masteries. It IS then mitigated by the CASTER's own DEF (absorption ≈ 0.85*(1 - e^(-2*DEF/3000))).

Affinity of the protected ally vs the attacker still applies to the pre-transfer hit (strong: -20% normal / -30% weak; weak: +30% normal). Crits transfer as normal hits but the transferred damage scales up by the PROTECTOR's C.DMG.
Does NOT stack — a second Ally Protection overrides the first (only one matters).
Absorbed damage cannot be increased by external effects (e.g. Demon Lord's Gathering Fury).

modelFlags.protectorBuild: high DEF/HP; crit stats wasted (transfer is raw)

buffs.name: Block Damage
buffs.def: Makes the Champion immune to ALL forms of damage.

buffs.name: Block Debuffs
buffs.def: While active, the Champion is immune to all debuffs. Instant negative effects (e.g. Decrease Turn Meter) are NOT affected and work as normal.

buffs.name: Bone Armor
buffs.def: Starts each Round with a number of Bone Armor stacks. Each stack reduces damage from a single hit, then disappears. Max 3 stacks at once.

buffs.name: Continuous Heal
buffs.def: Heals the target by 7.5/15% of their MAX HP at the beginning of their turn.

buffs.name: Counterattack
buffs.def: When attacked, strikes back at the attacker with their Default Skill for 75% damage. Only counters once vs a multi-hit skill. Does not counter a counterattack. Does not count as a turn. Extra-Turn-on-kill default skills do NOT grant the extra turn during a counter.

buffs.name: Fervor
buffs.def: Increases damage inflicted by 10% and reduces damage received by 10%.

buffs.name: Fortify
buffs.def: Reduces any enemy Ignore DEF effects by 15% or 25%. (Defensive counter to Shatter/Ignore-DEF.)

buffs.name: Immutable
buffs.def: Prevents any attempt to INCREASE a Champion's skill cooldown. Each stack fully blocks one such attempt then is consumed. No duration (can't be extended/reduced/spread). If immune to cooldown increases, stacks aren't consumed; if the effect cannot be resisted, one stack is removed. Fewer stacks won't overwrite a higher total. If stolen, all stacks transfer.

buffs.name: Increase Accuracy
buffs.def: Increases the recipient's ACC by 25% or 50%.

buffs.name: Increase Attack
buffs.def: Increases Battle Attack (current ATK incl. all modifiers) by 25% or 50%.

buffs.name: Increase Critical Rate
buffs.def: Increases C.RATE by 15% or 30%.

buffs.name: Increase Critical Damage
buffs.def: Increases Critical Damage dealt by 15% or 30%.

buffs.name: Increase Resistance
buffs.def: Increases Battle Resistance by 25% or 50%.

buffs.name: Increase Defense
buffs.def: Increases Battle Defense by 30% or 60%.

buffs.name: Increase Speed
buffs.def: Increases Battle Speed by 15% or 30%.

buffs.name: Intercept
buffs.def: Blocks any attempt to apply CROWD-CONTROL debuffs — even ones that 'cannot be blocked': Stun, Sleep, Freeze, Provoke, Fear, True Fear, Petrification, Sheep. Each stack negates one such attempt then is consumed. No duration (can't be extended/reduced/transferred). vs Block Debuffs: if the CC is blockable an Intercept stack is NOT consumed (even if immune); if the CC cannot be blocked, a stack IS always removed (even if immune). Gaining fewer stacks won't lower the current count. If stolen, the thief gains the exact stack count.

buffs.name: Lightning Orb
buffs.def: Whenever an enemy gains a buff or Turn Meter, places 1 Lightning Orb stack (max 3). When activated, one stack protects a random other active buff from removal/steal/transfer, then disappears. At 3 stacks, hits inflict Bonus Damage based on MAX HP (per hit, not an extra hit); after applying, all stacks are removed.

buffs.name: Magma Shield
buffs.def: Reinforces HP for N turns. Damage hits the Magma Shield first (unless the attack ignores Shields); on expiry/0 the buff is removed. Also REFLECTS an equal amount of damage back to the attacker.

buffs.name: Reflect Damage
buffs.def: Any attacker of a target with this buff takes 15/30% of the damage they inflicted.

buffs.name: Revive on Death
buffs.def: If the Champion dies, they are immediately revived with 30% HP and 0% Turn Meter.

buffs.name: Shatter
buffs.def: Increases the Champion's Ignore DEF effects by 7.5% or 15%. (Offensive; countered by Fortify.)

buffs.name: Shield
buffs.def: Reinforces HP for N turns; damage hits the Shield first (unless the attack ignores Shields); removed on expiry/0. Damage to the Shield does NOT count as damage to the Champion, so Lifesteal does not benefit from it.

buffs.name: AoE Shield
buffs.def: Shield (see Shield) placed on ALL allies at once.

buffs.name: Stone Skin
buffs.def: Decreases damage (except from Bombs and HP Burn), removes all debuffs except Bombs/HP Burn, grants immunity to all debuffs except Bombs/HP Burn, and gives extra Stone Skin HP. Also immune to Decrease MAX HP and Decrease Turn Meter effects.

buffs.name: Stormcall
buffs.def: Each stack increases damage by 5% (max 5). At 5 stacks, attacking applies an IRRESISTIBLE Stun to the target and all stacks are removed.

buffs.name: Strengthen
buffs.def: Decreases incoming damage by 15% or 25%.

buffs.name: Taunt
buffs.def: Forces enemies to attack the taunter. Can be stolen/removed/duration-decreased; Petrification removes it; cannot be spread or duration-increased. Provoke has priority over Taunt. With two taunters the enemy may hit either (but a non-Veiled taunter is targeted before a Veiled one).

buffs.name: Unkillable
buffs.def: The Champion cannot fall below 1 HP for the duration.

buffs.name: Total Guard
buffs.def: (Team-wide protective buff; treat as a strong damage-mitigation/guard buff — verify exact value in skill text.)

buffs.name: Veil
buffs.def: Cannot be targeted directly by enemies, but CAN be hit by AoE or random-target attacks. Lost when the Champion attacks/deals damage (non-damaging skills keep it). Ineffective if the WHOLE team is Veiled, or only one Champion remains. Reduces incoming AoE damage by 7.5%.

buffs.name: Perfect Veil
buffs.def: Stronger Veil: same as Veil but is NOT lost when attacking/dealing damage. Reduces incoming AoE damage by 15%. Same whole-team/last-Champion ineffectiveness rules.

debuffs.name: Berserk
debuffs.def: Increases damage inflicted AND damage received by 50%.

debuffs.name: Block Active Skills
debuffs.def: Prevents the affected Champion from using ACTIVE skills (other than their default and passive skills) for the duration. Cooldowns refresh as normal. Does NOT work on bosses (→ useless vs a dungeon boss; only vs minions/waves/PvP).

debuffs.name: Block Passive Skills
debuffs.def: Prevents the affected Champion from using PASSIVE skills (other than their default and active skills) for the duration. Cooldowns refresh as normal. Does NOT work on bosses (→ useless vs a dungeon boss; only vs minions/waves/PvP).

debuffs.name: Block Buffs
debuffs.def: All buffs applied to the Champion are automatically blocked and have no effect.

debuffs.name: Block Revive
debuffs.def: Prevents the affected enemy from being revived/resurrected by their allies. Requires an ACC check to LAND — NOT guaranteed (project-confirmed); a resisted Block Revive lets the minion revive at the next trigger. On a DEAD enemy the debuff does NOT expire and cannot be removed. (Key vs Ice Golem, whose boss resurrects fallen minions below an HP threshold.) Does NOT trigger Arcane Celerity mastery; Lydia the Deathsiren can bypass it via her passive.

debuffs.name: Bomb
debuffs.def: On expiry, deals direct damage that IGNORES DEF, scaling off the stat in the skill description.

debuffs.name: Deathbrand
debuffs.def: A Champion under Deathbrand receives Block Revive when killed.

debuffs.name: Decrease Accuracy
debuffs.def: Reduces Battle Accuracy by 25/50%.

debuffs.name: Decrease Attack
debuffs.def: Decreases Battle Attack by 25/50%.

debuffs.name: Decrease Critical Damage
debuffs.def: Decreases Critical Damage inflicted by 15% or 30%.

debuffs.name: Decrease Critical Rate
debuffs.def: Decreases Critical Rate by 15% or 30%.

debuffs.name: Decrease Defense
debuffs.def: Decreases Battle Defense by 30/60%. (Amplifies ATTACK damage only — NOT DoT; see damage-mechanics §1.)

debuffs.name: Decrease Resistance
debuffs.def: Decreases Battle Resistance by 25% or 50% — makes landing debuffs easier (less ACC required).

debuffs.name: Decrease Speed
debuffs.def: Decreases Battle Speed by 15/30%.

debuffs.name: Enfeeble
debuffs.def: The Champion can only land WEAK hits (unless a skill states otherwise).

debuffs.name: Ensnare
debuffs.def: Any Turn Meter INCREASE the Champion receives is reduced by 50% or 100%.

debuffs.name: Fatigue
debuffs.def: After using an active skill, the Champion receives a 1-turn Sleep. If they use a debuff-removing skill, Fatigue is removed and no Sleep is placed.

debuffs.name: Fear
debuffs.def: 50% chance for a skill to MISFIRE — the skill doesn't activate and the Champion forfeits their turn.

debuffs.name: True Fear
debuffs.def: Like Fear, but on a failed skill the Champion loses their turn AND the attempted skill is pushed onto cooldown. Cannot be resisted (verify per skill text).

debuffs.name: Freeze
debuffs.def: Cannot act for N turns; cooldowns do NOT refresh while active; the Champion only takes 75% of incoming damage.

debuffs.name: Heal Reduction
debuffs.def: Any healing received is reduced by 50/100%.

debuffs.name: Hex
debuffs.def: The Champion takes damage whenever their ALLIES do (DEF-ignoring): 2% of AoE damage and 10% of single-target damage inflicted on allies. Only from direct attacks on allies, not lasting effects. Originals still take full damage.

debuffs.name: HP Burn
debuffs.def: At the start of the affected Champion's turn, they and all allies take 3% of their respective MAX HP. Only ONE HP Burn can be active on a Champion at a time.

debuffs.name: Hunter's Gaze
debuffs.def: Damage from skills to this Champion cannot be decreased/blocked/redirected/transferred and BYPASSES Unkillable, Block Damage, Increase DEF, Strengthen, Ally Protection, Veil, Perfect Veil, Shield. Applies only to direct skill damage (not debuffs/passives/masteries). The target can still Evade.

debuffs.name: Infest
debuffs.def: When an enemy under Infest is SLAIN, all remaining enemies take PURE damage equal to 50% of the dead enemy's MAX HP (cannot crit). Against Bosses or their minions, capped at 10% of MAX HP. (→ weak in dungeons; an Arena/multi-enemy tool.)

debuffs.name: Leech
debuffs.def: Any Champion attacking a Leeched target heals for 18% of the damage inflicted.

debuffs.name: Necrosis
debuffs.def: When an enemy dies, 1 Necrosis stack is applied to all surviving enemies (accumulates per death). At the start of their turn, each Champion takes 5% of MAX HP per Necrosis stack.

debuffs.name: Nullify
debuffs.def: The Champion cannot have skills activated, join Ally Attacks, gain Extra/Instant Turns, have cooldowns decreased, have Shield increased, have destroyed HP restored, have HP swapped/balanced, Evade, or have Turn Meter equalized.

debuffs.name: Petrification
debuffs.def: Removes all buffs and prevents the next turn. Cannot receive buffs and is more susceptible to debuffs. Instant effects don't work (except Remove Debuff). Takes only 40% of incoming damage, but Bomb damage is increased by 300%.

debuffs.name: Poison
debuffs.def: Damages the target by 2.5/5% of MAX HP at the beginning of their turn. Not affected by other effects; scales only off the target's MAX HP.

debuffs.name: Poison Sensitivity
debuffs.def: Increases Poison damage taken by 25% or 50%.

debuffs.name: Provoke
debuffs.def: The Champion can only attack the Champion that applied it for N turns, using their Default Skill. Has priority over Taunt.

debuffs.name: Sheep
debuffs.def: Loses access to normal skills; can only use the Sheep skill (attacks 1 enemy, allied Sheep join; 50% chance to remove Sheep after attacking). On expiry/defeat, returns with 50% HP.

debuffs.name: Sleep
debuffs.def: Cannot act for N turns; cooldowns do NOT refresh; ANY incoming damage removes Sleep.

debuffs.name: Seal
debuffs.def: Blocks effects from Gear Sets and Masteries (except stat boosts). Effects activated before placement aren't blocked.

debuffs.name: Master Seal
debuffs.def: Like Seal, and ADDITIONALLY blocks Blessings (except stat boosts).

debuffs.name: Smite
debuffs.def: When the Champion uses an Active Skill, a meteorite hits for 25% of their MAX HP + 5% of all other enemies' MAX HP. Only one Smite per team at a time.

debuffs.name: Stun
debuffs.def: Cannot act for N turns; cooldowns do NOT refresh while active.

debuffs.name: Weaken
debuffs.def: Increases damage received by the target by 15/25%.

boss_specific.name: Eclipse
boss_specific.def: Only Amius places this on himself; transforms him into his Alternate Form. On expiry he reverts to Base Form.

boss_specific.name: Mark of the Hydra
boss_specific.def: Marks one Champion for the Devouring Skill. Can't be removed, duration-decreased, blocked, or resisted; ignores Veil/Perfect Veil; placed regardless of debuff count.

boss_specific.name: Digesting
boss_specific.def: The marked Champion (20-turn countdown) is devoured, then digested (5-turn countdown). Enough damage to the digesting Head frees them; if the countdown expires they're consumed and cannot be revived/returned.

boss_specific.name: Life Barrier
boss_specific.def: Extra Life-Barrier HP with the HIGHEST priority of all buffs; always works for its duration. Can't be removed/stolen/manipulated. Counts as a Shield for shield-scaling damage. Sits over Stone Skin and Hydra Digestion — must be removed first to damage those.

boss_specific.name: Poison Cloud
boss_specific.def: Blocks damage from Poison debuffs. If an HP Burn was placed before Poison Cloud, the Cloud won't work (but isn't removed). Not affected by Steal/Remove/Spread/Increase/Decrease Buff Duration.

boss_specific.name: Serpent's Will
boss_specific.def: Reduces all damage a NEW Head takes by 75%, from when the dead Head transforms until the new Head's first move. Can't be removed/stolen/spread; duration fixed.

boss_specific.name: Vengeance
boss_specific.def: Increases the Head of Wrath's damage by 300%, auto-activated after it receives 15 hits (Vengeance counter). Boosts damage twice: right after activation and on its next turn. Can't be removed/stolen/spread; duration fixed.

boss_specific.name: Decapitated
boss_specific.def: Increases damage taken by a cut-off Head by 200%, active while the Head is dead. Can't be removed; duration fixed.

boss_specific.name: Pain Link
boss_specific.def: The affected Champion receives 15% of all damage the Head of Suffering takes (the Head takes 100%). Can be blocked/removed/duration-changed. Awakens Sleeping Champions. If also under Block Damage, takes no Pain Link damage.

boss_specific.name: Eternal Rage
boss_specific.def: Increases Iragoth's SPD and makes him ignore Unkillable/Block Damage/Shield and 50% of the target's DEF when attacking.

boss_specific.name: Rage
boss_specific.def: Increases the Minotaur's damage dealt by 400%.

boss_specific.name: Dazed
boss_specific.def: Increases the Minotaur's damage received by 200%. Duration cannot be increased.

boss_specific.name: Hex (Minotaur)
boss_specific.def: Minotaur's Tremor Stomp deals DOUBLE damage to Champions with this debuff. (Different from the general Hex keyword.)

boss_specific.name: Duel
boss_specific.def: Placed on producer + target. Target can only use its default skill against the producer (Provoke-like); producer deals +50% to the target, others deal -50% to a duelist. End it by depleting the producer's Duel bar (0.5% of producer MAX HP). Removed if producer/target dies. Priority over Taunt/Veil/Perfect Veil. Guaranteed; can't be removed/resisted/stolen/spread/blocked.

misc.name: Debuff Spread
misc.def: Copies one or more existing debuffs from one targeted enemy to ALL enemy Champions. (Derived use: turns a single-target debuffer's debuffs into team-wide pressure — the enemy-side mirror of Buff Spread.)

misc.name: Buff Spread
misc.def: Copies one or more existing buffs from one targeted ally to ALL ally Champions. (Derived use: turns a single-target buffer's buffs into team-wide coverage — the ally-side mirror of Debuff Spread.)

misc.name: Evade
misc.def: The affected Champion completely DODGES an enemy skill — preventing ALL of that skill's damage, debuffs, and Turn-Meter manipulation.

misc.name: Polymorph
misc.def: A Legendary Chaos/Arena BLESSING (nicknamed 'Sheep'). When the wearer is attacked, a chance to transform the attacker into a Sheep (applies the Sheep debuff), disabling their skills; irresistible at max level. Primarily an ARENA mechanic — dungeon bosses are CC-immune, so ~no dungeon use. See Sheep.

misc.name: Delay
misc.def: Prevents fatal damage, delaying it to the Champion's next turn (they can still be killed by enemies before then). Healing equal to the delayed amount cancels it; partial healing reduces it; no healing = full fatal damage on their next turn.

misc.name: Debuff Activation
misc.def: Forces existing ENEMY damage-over-time debuffs ([Poison]/[HP Burn]/[Necrosis]) to tick IMMEDIATELY, out of turn. Damage acceleration, not damage creation: it realises DoT that was already placed, sooner. (Derived use: converts a stacked DoT into damage NOW rather than over the target's next turns — and by cashing the stack in, keeps the enemy's debuff slots from saturating.)
misc.mechanics: Distinct from three neighbours that are easy to confuse: Poison Explosion DETONATES and consumes the stack for %maxHP burst; Poison Sensitivity AMPLIFIES each tick; Increase Debuff Duration EXTENDS the stack. Activation forces an early tick of what is already there and (per Plarium text) does not itself place or remove the debuff. Because DoT is %MAX-HP-based, activated damage is DEF-INDEPENDENT — Decrease DEF does nothing for it (lib/damage-mechanics.js §1).
misc.variants: Often GATED on a debuff count (Ezio A2: only on enemies under 4+ debuffs) or limited to one tick (Artak A2: "one tick of all [HP Burn]"). The gate and the tick-count are the dims a richer champion_tags row should carry.

misc.name: Buff Activation
misc.def: Forces an existing ALLY buff ([Continuous Heal]) to tick IMMEDIATELY, out of turn. SUSTAIN acceleration — the ally-side mirror of Debuff Activation, exactly as Buff Spread mirrors Debuff Spread.
misc.mechanics: Value is turns-of-survival, not damage. Per lib/damage-mechanics.js §3 sustain is MULTIPLICATIVE, so pulling a heal forward can matter far more than its raw number — an on-demand heal answers burst that a start-of-turn tick would arrive too late for.
misc.variants: May be single-buff or all-allies (Donatello A1: "one random [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies").
